changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Rename detection_prompt to criteria to match domain model

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Delete NEEDS_REVIEW findings and tighten verdict to three-way enum

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Drop guidance_method column and its CHECK constraint from practice_finding
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE practice_finding DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_practice_finding_guidance_method; ALTER TABLE practice_finding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS guidance_method;

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Drop delivery dedup index — findPreviousDeliveryCommentId query deleted
